# RankyPulse

> RankyPulse is an AI-powered SEO audit and growth platform that helps site owners, agencies, and small teams find and fix technical SEO issues, track rankings, research keywords, and analyze competitors.

## Core Features

- **Free Site Audit**: Crawl any website in real time. Surfaces crawl errors, title tag issues, meta description problems, broken links, page speed failures, canonical tag issues, and schema markup errors. No signup required.
- **Meta Tag Checker**: Validates title tags and meta descriptions for length, uniqueness, and keyword alignment.
- **Keyword Research**: Discover high-opportunity keywords with search volume and difficulty data.
- **Rank Tracking**: Daily keyword ranking updates for desktop and mobile.
- **Backlink Analyzer**: View backlink profiles, domain ratings, and toxic link detection.
- **Competitor Analysis**: Compare keyword rankings, backlinks, and content gaps against up to 5 competitors.
- **Action Center**: Prioritized fix queue that tells you exactly what to address next based on traffic impact.

## Pricing

- Free tier: Site Audit + Meta Tag Checker (no account needed)
- Pro Plan: All tools, automated audits, rank tracking, competitor intelligence — $X/month
- Business Plan: Team features, white-label reports, API access

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://rankypulse.com
- Free Audit Tool: https://rankypulse.com/audit
- Pricing: https://rankypulse.com/pricing
- Blog: https://rankypulse.com/blog
- All Tools: https://rankypulse.com/tools

## About

RankyPulse was built for site owners who need clear, actionable SEO data without enterprise pricing or a steep learning curve. Every audit result includes a plain-English explanation and a step-by-step fix guide.

Contact: support@rankypulse.com
